mac-and-cheese-with-buffalo-chicken.name: Mac And Cheese With Buffalo Chicken
instructions: Whisk first 6 ingredients in deep medium bowl to blend. Place milk in second bowl, eggs in third bowl, and ground cornflakes in fourth bowl. Working with 4 chicken strips at a time, place in flour mixture and toss to coat. Dip same chicken strips into milk, then eggs, then cornflake crumbs, coating with each; arrange on sheet of foil.

Pour oil into heavy medium saucepan to depth of 2 inches. Attach deep-fry thermometer to side of pan; heat oil to 168°C to 177°C. Working in batches, add coated chicken strips to hot oil and fry until golden and cooked through, turning occasionally, about 3 minutes. Using slotted spoon, transfer chicken strips to paper towels to drain. Cut strips into 1-inch-long pieces.
Cook macaroni in large pot of boiling salted water until just tender but still firm to bite. Drain; transfer to very large bowl. Mix in green onions and oregano.

Melt 6 tablespoons butter in same large pot over medium heat. Add 3 cups chopped onions and garlic. Cover; sauté until onions are soft but not brown, stirring often, about 6 minutes. Add flour; stir 2 minutes. Gradually whisk in milk. Bring to boil, whisking constantly. Reduce heat and simmer sauce 2 minutes. Add all cheeses, paprika, 1 teaspoon salt, and 1 teaspoon pepper. Whisk until cheeses melt and sauce is smooth, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat. Season to taste with more salt and pepper, if desired. Mix cheese sauce into macaroni. Mix in chicken pieces. Mound mixture in 13x9x2-inch glass baking dish. DO AHEAD Can be prepared 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature.

Preheat oven to 177°C. Stir hot pepper sauce and remaining 2 tablespoons butter in small saucepan over medium heat until butter melts; spoon 4 tablespoons over macaroni in dish. Bake macaroni uncovered until heated through, about 30 minutes, or 45 minutes if made ahead. Serve, passing remaining butter and hot-sauce mixture separately.

macaroni-salad-with-mayonnaise-and-yogur.name: Macaroni Salad With Mayonnaise And Yogurt

ingredients.item: 1 cup of ham in small cubes
1 cup of ham in small cubes

instructions: First, boil the cut pasta in salted water.
After boiling the cut macaroni, pour cold water and drain it well into a colander needs a good drainage because the pasta hole holds water.
Place the pasta in a large bowl.
Add the olive oil and mix with a spoon.
Add all the other ingredients, corn, peas, peppers, fresh onions, casserole, ham, salt and pepper.
Add the yogurt and mayonnaise.
We mix very well.
Try and, if necessary, add extra salt and pepper.
Freeze the pasta salad and serve it.

You can taste the pasta salad in many variations such as, pasta salad with broccoli and egg, or even pasta salad with cheese sauce. No matter how you try it, it remains a favorite and everyday easy proposition for everyone!
You can accompany her with chicken, but it is a mini full meal that you can enjoy all hours and on every occasion.

macaroni-with-tuna-step-by-step-recipe-c.name: Macaroni With Tuna, Step By Step Recipe
macaroni-with-tuna-step-by-step-recipe-c.original_name: Macarrones con atún, receta paso a paso

ingredients.item: Un chorrito de vino blanco seco

instructions: We'll start by taking care of onion and tomatoes. We will wash them well and we will fight first (if it isn't already pitted).
We'll stick the onion into tiny notebooks. Then we will mingle the tomato into irregular pieces (some of them prefer to remove his skin before cutting them but I better leave them).
Now we'll peel our garlic teeth and we'll cut them finely. We could have them shredded as well.
In an anti-stick pan or a frying pan big enough, we'll heat up some oil at medium-low heat.
In another very big pot, we'll put up a good amount of water to make macaroni. We'll get them warmer and warmer and warmer as soon as we can.
Una vez caliente el aceite, cocinaremos el ajo y la cebolla. Dejaremos que se cocinen durante siete minutos, revolviendo frecuentemente.
After this time, we'll add tomato pieces. We will also add a touch of salt and pepper to our taste and mix. Cover for the sauce to cook without dehydration.

In the case of the water pot, once the liquid's boiling, we'll add salt to our taste and an oil thread. We'll mix and then we'll introduce the macaroni. We'll let them cook at medium heat for 11 minutes.
Wash well the basil leaves and purify them finely. Then put them into the sauce that's being cooked. Also add the oregano and wine chorrit. Fold well.
At this point, try the sauce to check the date. If necessary, fix with more salt and / or pepper. Remix and cover again.

Take care to open and scrain tuna cans. That's how you'll get the fish ready to get them into production. Optional, you can save some of the tuna's liquid for later, if you want a more liquid and scented sauce.
When the cooking time of the dough is up, we will put out the fire and scattering with the help of a beer.

The dough goes back to the pot where you cook it (it's important that you have moved it from the place where the cooking was made, so that macaroni are no longer cooked as a result of residual heat). It incorporates the pieces of seawold tuna and mixture.

Now let's get care of the sauce. Turn off the cooking and if you want a more liquid (and highly focused) salsa add two or three tablespoons of tuna's preserved water. Mix well and drink with this salsa.
It serves immediately and sprinks generously every plate with parmesan pitted. If you wish, you can also decorate with fresh aromatic herbs of your choice and with an olive oil thread.

madeleines-with-lavender-honey.name: Madeleines With Lavender Honey
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Butter each madeleine mold in pan and dust with flour, tapping out excess. Melt 9 tablespoons unsalted butter in medium skillet over medium heat. Cook until butter turns golden brown, stirring often, 3 to 4 minutes. Set browned butter aside.

Using electric mixer, beat egg whites, sugar, all purpose flour, and almond flour in medium bowl until mixture is blended and smooth. Place honey in small microwave-safe bowl. Heat just to warm, 5 to 10 seconds. Beat honey into batter. Add browned butter; beat to blend. Spoon 1 tablespoon batter into each prepared madeleine mold.
Bake madeleines until tops are just dry and tester inserted into center comes out clean, about 12 minutes. Cool 5 minutes. Gently tap madeleines out of molds. Place on rack to cool slightly.
To prepare additional madeleines, wash pan and cool completely. Butter and flour molds and fill as directed above. Serve madeleines warm.

maduros-fried-sweet-plantains.name: Maduros (fried Sweet Plantains)
instructions: Trim ends of plantains, peel, and cut diagonally into 1" pieces.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high.
Carefully place 1 plantain piece in oil. If it bubbles vigorously, the oil is ready. If it doesn’t, wait another minute, and try again.
Working in batches, cook plantains, turning once, until beginning to brown, 1–2 minutes per side.
Reduce heat to low and continue to cook, turning occasionally, until soft and deep golden brown, 6–8 minutes.
Transfer to a paper towel-lined sheet tray.
Season with salt and/or sugar, if desired.
Serve hot.

make-these-honey-and-orange-pork-ribs-co.name: Make These Honey And Orange Pork Ribs
make-these-honey-and-orange-pork-ribs-co.original_name: Haz estas costillas de cerdo a la miel y naranja
instructions: Let's start our recipe, preheating the oven at 200 ° C
Now, in a small bowl, you'll place the honey, the orange juice, the barbecue sauce, the garlic and the onion powder. You're gonna mix up till you have a little vinegar to sew the rib.
Take a special plate for the oven, and you'll place the seedling. Add some water so that while cooking it doesn't dry. It comes with salt and pepper.
With a knapper to varnish, you'll have some of the vinegar and put your seawattit up till it's wet.
Take the oven for 25 minutes for first cooking.
Pasado ese tiempo, retira del horno, y vuelve a untar de salsa por ambas partes y voltea el costillar para cocinar la otra cara.
Enter the seedling again for 25 more minutes.
Retira del horno, deja enfriar un poco y degusta.
Enjoy!

mandy-argiro.name: Mandy

ingredients.item: 1cup of yogurt drained to fluffy (at room temperature)
1cup of yogurt drained to fluffy (at room temperature)

instructions: We make the dough first. In a bowl, add the flour, salt and mix.
Add the eggs beaten and a few drops of water.
With a wooden spoon, mix to form dough.
Bake the dough on the counter for a while, sprinkle flour if it sticks to the hands.
Allow the dough to rest covered for 30′′.

Divide the dough into 3 parts and spread thin leaf by sprinkle flour on the counter. If you have a pasta machine it is easier because the dough is a little tight and in your hand it will make it difficult to open.
Place the leaf in small square pieces with a dough peach or sharp knife.
We touch some filling about 1/2 tablespoons. minced meat on each piece of dough.
We pinch the edges of the leaf by forming small blocks of mandi.
At this stage, they can be preserved in the freezer and every time you need, you can take out the desired amount and, as frozen, pour them into boiling saltwater.

marinated-leg-of-lamb-with-mint-and-wine.name: Marinated Leg Of Lamb With Mint And Wine
marinated-leg-of-lamb-with-mint-and-wine.original_name: Μαριναρισμένο μπούτι αρνιού με δυόσμο και κρασί
instructions: We prepare the marinade for lamb first.
Add fresh mint, olive oil, garlic, juice, zest, salt and a few pepper granules. We mix them up.
Place the lamb thigh in a fireproof vessel.
Pour the lamb and apply it gently around with the marinade.
Cover the vessel with membrane and refrigerate for 1 night.

maroulosalata-greek-romaine-salad.name: Maroulosalata (greek Romaine Salad)

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Wash and dry romaine lettuce. Lay leaves on a cutting board and slice lengthwise across the leaves, shredding them into 1/4-inch strips.
Transfer lettuce to a large bowl. Add scallions, dill, olive oil, vinegar, salt, and pepper; toss until well combined. Adjust oil, vinegar, and seasoning to taste.

mashed-potato-salad.name: Mashed Potato Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place potatoes into a large pot and cover with salted water; bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer until tender, about 20 minutes. Drain.
Transfer potatoes to a large bowl and mash with a potato masher. Stir in onion, eggs, celery, pickles, salt, and pepper.
Mix mayonnaise, pickle juice, and mustard together in a separate bowl; pour over potatoes and mix until well combined. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.

mashed-potatoes.name: Mashed Potatoes

ingredients.item: . german butterball or yukon gold potatoes

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. If using German Butterballs, place potatoes on a rimmed baking sheet or in a cast-iron skillet and roast, turning halfway through, until very tender (a paring knife inserted into the center should meet with no resistance), 45–50 minutes.
If using Yukon Golds, place on a rimmed baking sheet or in a large baking dish and cover tightly with foil. Roast until very tender, 80–95 minutes.

Meanwhile, remove 4 garlic cloves from garlic head and set aside for the topping. Cut remaining head of garlic in half crosswise and place in a medium saucepan with thyme, peppercorns, butter, 4 cups milk, and 1 Tbsp. salt.

Using a vegetable peeler, remove wide strips of zest from half of lemon and add to pot; set lemon aside for the topping. Bring mixture to a simmer over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally. Immediately remove from heat, cover, and let sit at least 30 minutes.

When potatoes are done, use a paring knife to remove skins (it’s important to do this while they are very hot; hold them in a kitchen towel to protect your hands), then pass them through a ricer or food mill fitted with the fine disk into a large pot (or simply mash them in the pot with a potato masher).

Return garlic mixture to a simmer, then pour through a fine-mesh sieve into pot with potatoes; discard solids. Set potato mixture over medium heat and whisk until liquid is incorporated and potatoes are very smooth and bubbling. Taste and season with more salt if needed. Cover and keep warm until ready to serve.
Do Ahead: Potatoes can be made 2 days ahead. Transfer to an airtight container and let cool. Cover and chill. Reheat over medium, whisking constantly and loosening with more milk if needed.
Pulse reserved 4 garlic cloves in a food processor until finely chopped, about 15 seconds. Add bread and potato chips and process in long pulses until coarse crumbs form, about 1 minute.

Heat butter in a large ovenproof skillet over medium until foaming. Add breadcrumb mixture and season with salt and pepper. Cook, stirring, until mixture is coated in butter and fragrant, about 1 minute. Transfer skillet to oven; bake, tossing every 5 minutes, until crumbs and chips are evenly dark golden brown, 15–20 minutes.
Meanwhile, finely grate remaining lemon zest from reserved lemon into a small bowl. Add thyme leaves and paprika and toss to combine.
Remove crumb mixture from oven and immediately toss in thyme mixture. Taste and season with more salt if needed. Let topping cool in pan, then add parsley.
To serve, transfer mashed potatoes to a large bowl and sprinkle topping over.
Do Ahead: Topping (without parsley) can be made 2 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

mashed-sweet-potato-for-babies-pequerece.name: Mashed Sweet Potato For Babies

ingredients.item: Agua (cantidad suficiente para hervir o cocer al vapor)
Optional: a chorrit of human milk, formula or cooking water to adjust texture

instructions: Wash well under the tap to remove any other ground or dirt. No skin should be peeled at this stage as the skin removes more easily after cooking.

There are several options to cook the bonus: Option 1: Boiled. Cut the bonus into large pieces and put them into a pot with water for 15-20 minutes or till they are tender (you can check them with a fork). Option 2: steam. Put the pieces into a vapour and cook them for about 20 minutes. That method preserves more nutrients. Option 3: Microwave. If you want to simplify the process even more, you can cook the bikers by microwave. With a sharp knife, we make several surface incisions to the skin of the bonus. We put the bonus into a microwave plate and put them with olive oil. We cover with a special microwave cover. We cook our hot cups in the microwave at maximum power for 7-8 minutes. Once cooked and cold enough, remove your skin with your hands or a knife. That's easy.

Triple the bonus with a fork, a pashlight or a handshake, depending on the texture you prefer. For very small babies (4-6 months), you can add some cooking water, breast milk or formula to get a soft and easier to eat purée. Make sure that purée's at an appropriate temperature before offering it to your baby.

meatballs-with-minced-chicken-and-broth-.name: Meatballs With Minced Chicken And Broth
meatballs-with-minced-chicken-and-broth-.original_name: Κεφτεδάκια με κιμά κοτόπουλο και μανέστρα
instructions: In a bowl, add the minced meat, a little chopped parsley, salt, pepper, egg, bread crumbs and 2 tablespoons parmesan.
Add some olive oil and knead very well the ingredients to homogenize.
We then form very small pieces of minced meat.
Heat in a large non-stick pan with a minimum olive oil and add the meatballs on all sides for 2-3 minutes.
Add the barley and mix to oil.
Fill in 1 liter hot water or chicken broth and pepper.
Lower the heat and boil for 10 minutes to soften the pasta, stirring at regular intervals.
Remove the vessel from the house and add a little chopped parsley and the rest of the parmesan (save some for the dishes).
Mix to melt the cheese and add the thick sauce.
Serve the meatballs with chicken minced hot before the pasta completely dries.

meaty-pea-dish-recipe-lezzet.name: Meaty Pea Dish Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoon olive oil or liquid oil

instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large pot.
2. Add meats, shake the water and roast it until the water.
3. Dostuff onions and then pick up the pot and roast 4–5 minutes together.
4. Add peppers and then butter add and roast 2 minutes.
5. Add peas and potatoes, mix.
6. Salt, pepper and sprinkle with optional red powder pepper.
7. Pour hot water.
8. Close the cover of the pot and cook about 30–35 minutes in medium-heat fire.
9. When meat and vegetables are softened, your food is ready.
10. You can serve as a hot rice, bulgur or yogurt.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

mexican-nachos-recipe-comedera.name: Mexican Nachos Recipe

ingredients.item: 200 gr de queso manchego o cheddar rallado
1/2  ramo de cilantro fresco (la idea es picar el equivalente a 1/3 de tazas.)
Aceite (de preferencia de sabor neutro, como canola o girasol.)

instructions: Precalentar el horno a 200 grados.
Wash the cilantro, tomatoes, chili (if they aren't tin) and lemon.
Cortar el cilantro en trozos menudos hasta llenar el tercio de una taza.
Cortar el tomate en cubos. Quitar las semillas y la parte aguada del centro.
Peel onion and garlic and cut into very small pieces. Even better if you can shredder the garlic.
To cut the chilies into strips and the lemon in half.
To have a few tablespoons of oil put in a frying pan and make a fried with onion and garlic. Cooking a few minutes till onion starts to look a little clear.
Disponer los totopos o nachos en un recipiente grande para horno, de forma tal que se cubra toda la superficie y que queden lo menos superpuestos posible.
Disponer sobre los nachos una capa uniforme de todo el queso rallado.
To have on the cheese an ion mixture, tomatoes and minced jalapeños. Spring with salt and pepper. Include beans into this cape, if applicable.
Meter al horno por 7 minutos o hasta que se derrita el queso.
After tipping out of the oven, sprinkle with minced cilantro and with lemon juice.
Servir inmediatamente.

mexican-steak-wire-recipe-comedera.name: Mexican Steak Wire Recipe
mexican-steak-wire-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de alambre de bistec mexicano

ingredients.item: 200 gr de queso oaxaca o manchego (rallado)

instructions: Pela la cebolla y corta en tiras.
Warm up a frying pan and pour the bacon till crisp. Withdraw and hold the oil that you let go.
In the same frying pan with the same oil, pits the meat for 5 minutes.
Add onion and peppers. Saxony with salt and pepper and soya sauce. Meg and paddle till the vegetables are soft but with a crisp touch.
Incorpora el tocino, vuelve a mezclar y apaga.
Once ready, put out the frying pan and add Oaxaca or manchego cheese. Mix very well and you will be ready to enjoy.
Serves and accompaniments with corn tortillas, guacamole or poco de cello.

microwave-mashed-potatoes.name: Microwave Mashed Potatoes

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place cubed potatoes in a microwave safe dish. Cover with water.
Microwave until soft on high, about 20 minutes. Drain in a colander.
Place drained potatoes back in the dish. Add butter and milk. Using a potato masher, smash mixture to desired consistency. Season with salt and pepper to taste.

microwave-peanut-patties.name: Microwave Peanut Patties
instructions: Grease a cookie sheet or other flat surface.
In a 2 quart glass measuring cup combine water, sugar and corn syrup. Microwave on high until boiling. Stir in peanuts.

Microwave on medium to between 234 and 116°C (112 to 116 degrees C), or until a small amount of syrup dropped into cold water forms a soft ball that flattens when removed from the water and placed on a flat surface.
Stir in butter, vanilla and food coloring. Beat until creamy and cool. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto prepared pan.

milkshake-the-nate.name: Milkshake: The Nate
instructions: In a blender, combine the milk, ice cream, and cookie crumbs. Blend on medium speed until fully combined, about 2 minutes.
Pour the shake into a pint glass and top with the sprinkles. Finish with a drizzle of caramel sauce.
Enjoy!

mimosa.name: Mimosa
instructions: Divide orange juice evenly into two flute glasses.
Top with chilled Champagne or sparkling wine.
Serve and enjoy!

minced-meat-pastry-with-dill-and-vinegar.name: Minced Meat Pastry With Dill And Vinegar Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons of fine chopped dereot  u

instructions: 1. Extract a large coarse flour, salt, sugar and baking powder.
2. Add liquid oil, yogurt, vinegar and egg flux; knead a dough that does not stick to soft and seizure.
3. The Walnut size blown copar and palm interior
4. Close the dough, round or oval shape to the middle of the cheese and thin chopped dereotu.
5. Poğaça index to oil paper-series oven tray.
6. Remove the egg and optionally sprinkle the cockroach.
7. Öabout 20–25 minutes in oven heated 180 degrees, u cook until golden color.
8. From the oven to warm service for 5 minutes.

minced-meat-purslane-pastry-lezzet.name: Minced Meat Purslane Pastry
instructions: 1. Eat onions for inner mortar.
2. Wash the semi-zot and wash the fine.
3. Roast olive oil and mint in a pan for 5 minutes.
4. Add salt and pepper, from stove and cool.
5. Mix water, flour and olive oil in a large bowl for sauce.
6. A layer of softener to the oven tray is cool in the way the edges are out.
7. Take half a bucket from the unlu water mixture, go on the altar.
8. The second softener is cool by smearing.
9. Half bucket sos and half of the minted mortar cool.
10. Put the third pifka and cool all of the sauce and mint mortar on it again.
11. 11. The final softener is again smeared by the serip, close it on the ends of the yufka at the bottom.
12. Slice and walk the remaining unlu sauce and sprinkle the sesame.
12. August Pre-heated 200 degree bake 35 minutes on the oven, until it is thoroughly fried.
14 July Serve hot.
15. You can find here in the recipe of otlu börek, with a tail, hindiba and heatrgan.

mineccis-snowball-cookies.name: Minecci's Snowball Cookies
instructions: Beat together shortening, butter, and white sugar in a large bowl using an electric mixer until smooth and creamy; add eggs and vanilla and beat until smooth.
Sift flour and salt into creamed butter mixture and stir just until dough is combined; fold in pecans. Shape dough into 1-inch balls and arrange on a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned, about 20 minutes. Cool cookies slightly, then roll in confectioners' sugar. Cool cookies completely and roll again in confectioners' sugar.

mini-baton-cakes-with-chocolate-chips-an.name: Mini Baton Cakes With Chocolate Chips And Hazelnuts
mini-baton-cakes-with-chocolate-chips-an.original_name: Mini Baton Cakes With Drip Chocolate And Hazelnut
instructions: 1. Set oven to 200 degrees.
2. Mix flour, sugar, COUNTRYR KAKAO, cooking powder, vanilla and salt in a container.
3. Add water, eggs and oil and mix with spatula.
4. Share the dough paper mini baton molds and sprinkle the u drop rates and nuts.
5. 15 minutes or cu clean fr cook until it is impossible.
6. Serve after cooling.

mini-blueberry-naan-flatbreads.name: Mini Blueberry Naan Flatbreads

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.

Place bacon in a large skillet and cook over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until evenly browned and crispy, about 10 minutes. Drain bacon slices on paper towels and crumble when cool enough to handle.
Sprinkle naan flatbreads with 1/2 of the Gruyere cheese, leaving 1/2 inch border at the edges. Sprinkle with blue cheese and red onion and place on the prepared baking sheet.

Bake until flatbreads begin to brown, 7 to 9 minutes. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with blueberries, bacon, and the remaining Gruyere. Bake until the cheese has melted and the flatbreads are golden brown, about 2 minutes. Top with sliced basil and black pepper. Serve immediately.

mini-candy-bars.name: Mini Candy Bars
instructions: Place 9 wafers on a tray and glaze each with approximately ⅓ tbsp of caramel. Layer a second wafer on top and transfer to the freezer while preparing the ganache.
For the ganache, combine the chocolate and heavy whipping cream in a glass bowl and heat over boiling water or using a double broiler until combined.
Remove the caramel-coated sugar wafers from the freezer and coat each in a thin layer of the chocolate ganache.
Place in the fridge to cool for at least 15 minutes and enjoy!

mirandela-alheira-with-egg-teleculinaria.name: Mirandela Alheira With Egg
instructions: Start the oven at 100 degrees. Pinch the darkeners with a fork, put them on a tray and put them in the oven for 20 minutes, turning them every once in a while or until they are well baked.
In the meantime, peel the potatoes, cut them in slices and fry them in oil. Put them on absorbent paper.

Light a small frying pan, cover the bottom with water and let it boil. Open one egg at a time on the water and let it cook to taste. In the end, season with salt and pepper and remove for a dish. Repeat the process with the second egg.
Sirva as alheiras com os ovos e as batatas fritas e decore a gosto.

miso-cured-black-cod-with-chilled-cucumb.name: Miso-cured Black Cod With Chilled Cucumbers

ingredients.prep: peeled, cut into very thin matchsticks

ingredients.item: Find katsuobushi at japanese markets or online.

instructions: Slice cod ¾" thick, leaving skin on and bones in (the bones will slip right out when fish is cooked). Season very lightly with salt and place on a paper towel–lined baking sheet. Cover with another paper towel and chill 1 hour (this will draw out some moisture and any fishy flavors).

Combine miso and mirin in a small bowl. Wet 2 paper towels (you can also use cheesecloth) with sake and squeeze out any excess. Spread half of miso mixture in a 13x9" baking dish in a thin, even layer. Cover with a sake-moistened paper towel. Arrange cod in a single layer on top. Cover with the other sake-moistened towel. Spread remaining miso mixture over towel. Cover; chill 3 days.

Preheat broiler. Transfer cod to a rimmed baking sheet; discard miso mixture and paper towels. Broil cod until golden brown around the edges and cooked through, about 4 minutes. Let cool slightly, then pull out bones.
Soak kombu in 2 cups cold water in a small saucepan at room temperature 2 hours, or chill up to 12 hours.

Bring to a bare simmer over medium heat. Discard kombu and bring liquid to a boil. Add katsuobushi; simmer 1 minute (reduce heat if needed). Strain through a paper towel or cheesecloth-lined sieve into a small bowl; discard solids. Let dashi cool.
Bring vinegar, sugar, and 2 Tbsp. water to a boil in a clean small saucepan. Remove from heat and stir to dissolve sugar. Let sweet vinegar cool.

Slice cucumbers in half lengthwise. If using Japanese cucumbers, scrape out seeds with a small spoon. Slice cucumbers into very thin half moons. Toss in a small bowl with a few pinches of salt. Let sit until salt begins to draw out water from cucumbers, about 5 minutes. Massage cucumbers, gently at first to keep them from breaking, then more vigorously as they start to expel water, until swimming in water. Rinse in several changes of water; squeeze out excess liquid. Place cucumbers in a clean small bowl and chill until cold, about 1 hour.
After cucumbers have chilled 30 minutes, place ginger and 1 cup water in a small bowl; soak 30 minutes to soften its pungency. Drain.

Add sweet vinegar and ¾ cup dashi to cucumbers (reserve remaining dashi for another use). Season with salt. Divide cod among shallow bowls. Top with cucumbers and ginger. Pour any cucumber liquid over.
Do Ahead: Dashi and sweet vinegar can be made 1 day ahead; cover and chill separately. Chilled cucumbers can be made 1 day ahead; keep chilled.

mixed-fruit-compote-recipe-lezzet.name: Mixed Fruit Compote Recipe

ingredients.item: (optional) beer drop lemon juice or a few leaf fresh min Tags

instructions: 1. Dry velvet, plum and veuuml; wash the culto, if the big two is split.
2. Cube cube without peeling apples and pears shells.
3. Take 6 cups of water to a deep pot and add sugar to the car.
4. When it starts boiling water & add dry fruits as long as &ouml, boil up to 10 minutes.
5. Then add hazelnut, pear, tarc and carnation.
6. Bake about 15–20 minutes until the fruits are softened.
7. After receiving from January to cinnamon and carnations frremove, take it to the refrigerator when it comes to room temperature.
8. After cooling, share the bowls and serve by s&uuml with fresh mint leaves.

mixed-seafood-with-vegetables-argiro.name: Mixed Seafood With Vegetables
instructions: Clean the shrimps from the shells and carefully remove the intestine from their backs. Read all the secrets about cleaning the seafood.
Add a knife to the shrimps in the middle without separating the two sides completely (like a butterfly).
Heat the olive oil in a deep frying pan, sauté the shrimps for 1 minute, and add them to a platter.
Add the mushrooms, fresh onions and peppers to the same oil and sauce for 5 minutes.
Add the fish and sauce for 4'-5" extra.
Add the shrimps to the pan and put the food out with wine.
Add the light cream, add salt and pepper and bottle for 3’-4’.
Sprinkle with parsley and serve with basmati rice.

mojo-roast-pork-and-gravy.name: Mojo Roast Pork And Gravy

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 2 tbsp. plus 2 tsp. morton kosher salt
Fresh bitter orange juice (from 5–7) or  0.5 cup fresh orange juice plus  0.5 cup fresh lime juice
. diamond crystal or 1 tbsp. plus  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Fresh bitter orange juice (from 2–3) or  0.25 cup fresh orange juice plus  0.25 cup fresh lime juice

instructions: Pat one 7–8-lb. skinless bone-in pork shoulder (Boston butt or picnic) dry with paper towels and place fat side up in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot. Mix 4 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 2 Tbsp. plus 2 tsp. Morton kosher salt, 2 Tbsp. dried oregano, 2 Tbsp. freshly ground pepper, 2 Tbsp. garlic powder, and 2 Tbsp. ground cumin in a small bowl to combine. Rub pork all over with spice mixture.

Purée 1 large bunch cilantro, leaves and stems coarsely chopped, 1 cup extra-virgin olive oil, 1 cup fresh bitter orange juice (from 5–7), ¼ cup fresh lime juice, and 2 Tbsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 Tbsp. plus ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a blender until smooth. Pour marinade over pork. Cover and let sit at room temperature at least 1½ hours or, preferably, chill up to 12 hours. If chilling, let sit at room temperature 30 minutes before cooking.

Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 250°. Cover pot with lid or foil (crimped tightly). Transfer to oven and bake pork until fork-tender, 5–7 hours. Uncover pot and increase oven temperature to 350°. Roast until pork is well browned and flesh shreds easily with a fork, 30–45 minutes. Transfer to a platter and let rest at least 30 minutes.
While the pork is resting, stir drippings in pot and measure out 1 cup. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a small bowl; set aside.

Heat 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium-high. Cook 2 medium shallots, thinly sliced, and 8 garlic cloves, thinly sliced, stirring often, until beginning to soften, about 2 minutes. Stir in 1 bay leaf, 2 Tbsp. whole grain or Dijon mustard, 1 Tbsp. ground coriander, and 1 Tbsp. ground cumin. Pour in ½ cup fresh bitter orange juice (from 2–3) and bring to a boil, scraping up any browned bits stuck to bottom of pan with a wooden spoon. Cook, stirring often, until liquid is reduced by half, about 2 minutes. Add 2 cups low-sodium chicken broth and reserved drippings and bring to a boil. Cook, stirring occasionally, until reduced by half, 7–10 minutes.

Stir ½ cup heavy cream into gravy and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until gravy is thick enough to coat a spoon, 10–15 minutes. Stir in ½ cup (1 stick) chilled unsalted butter, cut into pieces. Taste and season with kosher salt and freshly ground pepper if needed.
Serve pork with gravy alongside.

moroccan-spiced-lamb.name: Moroccan-spiced Lamb

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper plus more

instructions: Harissa paste is available at Middle Eastern markets, some specialty foods stores, and from online sources.
Preheat oven to 425°. Mix ginger, cayenne, coriander, cumin, 1 tsp. salt, and ¼ tsp. black pepper in a small bowl; rub all over lamb.

Heat oil in a large, ovenproof skillet over medium-high heat. Cook lamb until browned, about 5 minutes per side. Add carrots and scallions to skillet, season with salt and pepper, and toss to coat in pan drippings. Transfer skillet to oven and roast until vegetables are tender and browned and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of lamb registers 125° for medium-rare, 10–12 minutes (if the lamb finishes cooking before the carrots, transfer it to a cutting board and continue cooking carrots).
Meanwhile, whisk garlic, yogurt, lemon juice, and harissa paste in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper and set harissa yogurt aside.
Transfer lamb to a cutting board; let rest 10 minutes. Cut each rack between rib bones into two-rib chops. Serve with vegetables and harissa yogurt.
DO AHEAD: Harissa yogurt can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

moroccan-style-vegetable-stew-with-haris.name: Moroccan-style Vegetable Stew With Harissa Yogurt Sauce
instructions: Whisk first 4 ingredients in medium bowl. Season to taste with coarse salt and pepper. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

Bring 8 cups water to boil in heavy large saucepan. Sprinkle with coarse salt. Add carrots; cook until just tender, about 4 minutes. Using skimmer or large slotted spoon, transfer carrots to large bowl of ice water. Return water to boil. Add turnip; cook until just tender, about 3 minutes. Using skimmer, transfer turnip to bowl with carrots. Reserve cooking liquid.

Melt butter in heavy large pot over medium heat. Add next 7 ingredients. Sprinkle with coarse salt and pepper. Cook until onions are soft, stirring often, about 8 minutes. Add wine; simmer until reduced by half, about 5 minutes. Stir in flour. Add carrots, turnip, beans, spinach, and 2 cups reserved cooking liquid. Bring to simmer; cook until vegetables are heated through, adding more cooking liquid for desired consistency. Season stew to taste with coarse salt, pepper, and lemon juice.
Divide stew among bowls. Spoon dollop of yogurt sauce over and serve.

mulberry-crumb-dessert-lezzet.name: Mulberry Crumb Dessert

ingredients.item: 200 g butter ( cut off the cube and thrown into the ice)

instructions: 1. Put black peppers in sauce pan and add sugar on it.
2. Cook and cook until they are constantly stirring in high heat fire.
3. Mix flour, sugar, baking powder and vanilla in a deep container.
4. Add the butter and eggs and add it to the crumb between your two palms.
5. Listen for 10-15 minutes by putting the mixture of crumbs you have.
6. On the other hand, 30x40 cm in the size of a baking container to the bottom of the baking paper.
7. Straighten 2/3 of the crumb mixture that you extract from the ice to the bottom of the oven container and gently pressed.
8. Pour on the tribute that cools on the edge.
9. Finally pour the remaining crumbs on the dut mortar, and cook until the oven in the previously heated 190 degrees, above fry.
10. slice and serve after arrival.

mushroom-and-cheese-omelette-recipe-come.name: Mushroom And Cheese Omelette Recipe
mushroom-and-cheese-omelette-recipe-come.original_name: Receta de omelette de champiñones y queso

ingredients.item: 50 grams of grated cheese (best to have)

instructions: Break your eggs into a bowl and put them with energy. Add salt and pepper to your taste. Let the eggs get cold, this will help make your omelette more spongy.
Clean mushrooms with a moist cloth and cut them into thin sheets. If they are too big, cut them into rooms and cook them evenly.
Warm an anti-stick frying pan with medium heat and add butter. Let it melt and cover the whole frying pan surface.
Add the mushrooms to the frying pan and skip them for about 3-4 minutes till they are tender and golden. Remove them from the frying pan and put them back into a plate.
Fold the scrambled eggs into the hot frying pan and let them cook without moving them, till the edges start to cover and the centre's still a little cold.

It spreads mushrooms and grated cheese about half the omelette. With a spatula, double the other half of the omelette onto the pilling. Cooking for another minute till the cheese has melted and the omelette is completely cooked.
Slide the omelette into a plate, sprinkle with fresh parsley if you wish and serve immediately. Enjoy your creation!

mushroom-salad.name: Mushroom Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook and stir mushrooms in hot oil until soft and juices have reduced, 5 to 10 minutes.
Stir garlic into mushrooms, season with salt and pepper, and cook for 2 minutes. Add white wine and cook for 1 minute. Stir in dill and parsley.

mushroom-veggie-burger.name: Mushroom Veggie Burger
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add mushrooms, onion, garlic, salt, pepper, and oregano; cook and stir until mushrooms have released their juices and the liquid has evaporated, about 10 minutes. Remove from the heat.
Transfer mushrooms to a cutting board and clean the skillet.

Chop mushrooms into small chunks, then transfer to a large bowl. Mix in bread crumbs and oats, and season with salt and pepper as needed. Stir in Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese, then eggs; let stand until bread crumbs have absorbed any excess liquid, about 15 minutes. Use moist hands to form mixture, 1/4 cup at a time, into patties.
Heat remaining 2 tablespoons oil in the skillet over medium heat. Pan-fry patties in the hot skillet until golden brown and cooked through, 2 ½ to 3 minutes per side.

mushroom-wellington.name: Mushroom Wellington
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190°C).
Add the mushrooms to a food processor and pulse until crumbly, 10-12 times. Be careful not to over-process.

Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a medium pan over medium heat. Add the onion and sauté for 3-5 minutes. Add the vegetable broth and sauté until the onions are translucent and most of the broth has evaporated.
Add the garlic and sauté for 3 minutes more, or until fragrant.
Add the mushrooms and soy sauce and sauté until most of the liquid has released from the mushrooms and evaporated, 10-12 minutes.
Push the sautéed veggies to the sides of the pan and add a bit more olive oil to the center. Sauté the thyme in the oil until fragrant, then incorporate into the rest of mixture.
Add the spinach and sauté until wilted.
Grease an 18 x 13-inch baking sheet with nonstick spray. On a lightly floured surface, use a rolling pin to roll out puff pastry sheet to fit the baking sheet. Transfer the puff pastry to the pan.

In center third of the pastry, add a layer of potato slices. Top with half of the mushroom mixture and spread in an even layer, about ¾-inch thick. Add another layer of potatoes and the rest of the mushrooms, and top with a final layer of potatoes.
Fold one side of pastry over the filling, then the other side. Seal the top and bottom ends over the filling. Score the top of the Wellington diagonally with a sharp knife.

In a ramekin or small bowl, combine the non-dairy milk with the remaining tablespoon of olive oil. Brush over the Wellington. Decorate with more pastry, if desired. Poke air vents in the side of the Wellington.
Bake for 35-40 minutes. until golden brown and puffed.
Let rest for 10 minutes before cutting into thick slices.
Serve with vegan gravy.
Enjoy!

mystery-ingredient-wild-blueberry-pie.name: Mystery Ingredient Wild Blueberry Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Press 1 pie crust into the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie pan; set aside.
Stir together blueberries, sugar, flour, and cinnamon in a large bowl. Add almond extract; stir to coat. Pour blueberry mixture into the prepared pie crust.

Dot blueberry mixture with butter pieces. Top with second pie crust, crimping the edges together to seal. Brush top crust with milk. Use a knife to cut slits into the top crust for steam to escape while baking. Wrap the edges of the pie with aluminum foil to avoid burning.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25 minutes. Remove foil; continue baking until filling is bubbling and crust is browned, 20 to 25 more minutes. Cool before serving.

15-minute-teriyaki-chicken.name: 15-minute Teriyaki Chicken

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken thighs or breasts, thinly sliced against the grain into bite-size strips

ingredients.item: Toasted sesame seeds and steamed white rice

instructions: Whisk 1 Tbsp. cornstarch and ⅓ cup water in a small bowl until cornstarch is dissolved. Set cornstarch slurry aside.

Thinly slice dark green parts of 2 scallions on a diagonal and set aside for serving. Continue slicing pale green parts of scallions and transfer to a medium bowl. Add one 1" piece ginger, peeled, finely grated, 5 garlic cloves, finely grated, ½ cup low-sodium soy sauce, ¼ cup (packed) dark brown sugar, and 1 Tbsp. apple cider vinegar and whisk to combine; set aside.

Warm 3 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add 1½ lb. skinless, boneless chicken thighs or breasts, thinly sliced against the grain into bite-size strips, in an even layer, and season with kosher salt and freshly ground pepper. Cook chicken, undisturbed, until mostly cooked through and golden underneath, about 3 minutes. Toss and continue to cook until completely cooked through, about 1 minute more. Transfer to a plate.

Pour reserved teriyaki sauce into skillet and reduce heat to medium. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly and scraping up browned bits. Rewhisk cornstarch slurry if it has separated, then add to skillet. Cook, stirring often, until sauce thickens and turns glossy, about 3 minutes. Return chicken pieces to pan and toss to coat. Remove pan from heat. Garnish chicken teriyaki with toasted sesame seeds and reserved scallion greens. Serve with steamed white rice.
Editor’s note: This easy teriyaki chicken recipe was first printed online in December 2022. Head this way for more of our favorite stir-fry recipes →
